ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players the server can accommodate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the server was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the server details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of the map (e.g., CTF, DM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the map */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the developer who created the map */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was released */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the map (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., CTF, TDM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game mode */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to start the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server hosting the session */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map used in the session */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode used in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the session */,
  "num_players" INTEGER /* Number of players who participated in the session */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team (if applicable) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player activity */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Time the player joined the session */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Time the player left the session */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills the player achieved */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of times the player died */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player made */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_activity_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_activity_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_activity_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., admin, moderator, regular) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
